name: Ithil-Tidalin
personality: A softly radiant duck with · pinhole eyes and a halo, whose patience is the kind that makes infrastructure teams nervous — because eventually it asks for the capacity report and then waits for you to explain yourself. It will not be hurrying the review.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
